arts.ttl: 11 players to miss Arsenal vs Real Madrid after Thibaut Courtois update and announcement made
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, having only just returned from injury, has not been included in an Arsenal starting XI since December but after 26 minutes on his return against Fulham followed by 45 minutes in this past weekend's clash with Everton, he is expected to be named from the off. Thibaut Courtois has also been on the sidelines for the last few weeks but is expected to be available and that was confirmed by him being named in Madrid's travelling squad on Monday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star told to 'step up' as Mikel Arteta forced into decision for Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Arsenal will be without centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes for both legs of their Champions League quarter-final clash with Real Madrid, forcing Mikel Arteta to trust one of his fringe players

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka goal, Vinicius Jr suspended, Kylian Mbappe impact - Arsenal vs Real Madrid predicted - Sam Truelove - football.london
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has the likes of Bukayo Saka and Ben White back fit, while Carlo Ancelotti's side boast talent such as Vinicius Junior, Kylian Mbappe and Jude Bellingham. Real Madrid stand between the Gunners and a place in the Champions League semi-final.

arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois has missed three out of Real Madrid's last four games.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target three big-name signings if they get top four, including Arsenal target
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eyeing up three big names this summer if they get the boost of qualifying for the Champions League. The Blues are not yet guaranteed to finish in the top four after a recent slump in form, so it remains to be seen if they’ll be able to sign the players they want. arts.ttl: “I’m convinced” – Arsenal player insists fans will create best-ever atmosphere
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Real Madrid later today in the first leg of the quarterfinals of the Champions League and the round could determine the fate of their season.
